title: Libraton PVC Pipe Cutter 63mm, Large PVC Cutter, Improved Blade for Heavy-Duty, Plastic Pipe Cutter for Cutting PVC Pipe, PEX Pipe, Plastic Pipes
features: IMPROVED BLADE: The Libraton PVC pipe cutter blade is of SK5 material, and an improved hardness process can ensure its longer service life.
CUTTING RANGE: The PVC cutter is of large cutting range, up to 2-1/2-inch (63mm) outer diameter.
WIDE APPLICATION: The ratchet PVC cutter can be also applied to cut different plastics pipes and tubes (PVC, PEX, CPVC, PP-R, PE, Rubber Hose, etc.)
RATCHET DESIGN: The plastic pipe cutter is designed with a ratcheting driver so that you can do the pipe cutting job with one hand easily. OUR TEST SHOWS THAT ONE CUT WITHIN 5 TO 20 SECONDS ONLY.

AFTER-SALES SERVICE: We offer a 12-month warranty on this PVC pipe cutter. And our after-sales service team promise to reply to your ANY question WITHIN 24H to help you solve ANY problem with the PVC cutter.
description: Product Description Why Choose Libraton Large PVC Cutter? Save your effort : the ratcheting design can ensure the PVC cutter work by one hand only. Large cutting range : the PVC pipe cutter is suitable for plastic pipes within 2-1/2inch (63mm). Longer service life : the blade of the plastic cutter is of improved SK5 material, which helps to cut harder plastic pipes. Features Ratchet Design Ratcheting design can help to save your effort when doing cutting work and ensure the PVC cutter can be well used by one hand only. V-Shaped Blade and Large Cutting Range(2-1/2inch) The V-shaped blade can help to fix the pipe when doing the cutting work. A large cutting range is suitable for most plastic pipes of different sizes. Safety Lock The safety lock helps to ensure your safety after cutting.
